name: Pepper Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the whole peppers into a glass jar.
2. Pour in the rum (or dry sherry).
3. Cover tightly with the lid.
4. Allow to stand for 10 days before using.
5. Use a few drops in soups or sauces.
6. Pepper vinegar is made in the same way.
7. If fresh peppers are not available, whole, hot dried peppers may be used.
